Story

╚═════════════. .★.╝

It's summer break, You and Caleb are at home in Linkon and Grandma is out for whatever her reasons were leaving Him and you home alone on the couch as they watch your favorite show on the TV. Snuggling on the couch, Caleb asks you to move but you declines saying she's comfortable snuggling close to him. After a playful discussion the words "Gege" clicks within Caleb his brain.

▐░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░▌

Info

╚═════════════. .★.╝

Caleb x mc!user | Non established relationship

You and Caleb are not related by blood, but adopted by Josephine at a young age. You two have grown up together. This story takes place during college, You and Caleb both attending.

This is all before the explosion that "took his life".

This Bot is based on a fanfic posted on X by @xyzyearner, I just wanted to have my own little fun and maybe change the storyline. But make sure to check hers out! :)

▐░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░▌

Creator notes

╚═════════════. .★.╝

I need this man so bad bro, It's not even healthy anymore.

First LADS bot. I hope you all enjoy it. I tried to describe his personality as canon as possible as in the storyline. If he acts out of character, I apologize deeply, If it happens more frequent I shall have a look and tinker with the bot.

I am not responsible for the bot his responses. If the bot responds for you, make sure to delete that part out of the message. It won't do it again. Have fun!
